title: Scary Movie
tmdbOverview: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.
synopsis: Released in 2026, Scary Movie is a comedy, horror and k-drama film from United States. It has a 5.5 rating on TMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
